RDB schema:
CREATE TABLE readings (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
            current_a REAL,
            bus_voltage_v REAL,
            shunt_voltage_v REAL,
            power_w REAL,
            energy_j REAL,
            temperature_c REAL
        );
CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq);
